title: TZ2 duplicate path discovery
objective:
Create file governance/validators/discover_ssot_duplicate_paths.py with content #!/usr/bin/env python3
from pathlib import Path
import json

TARGET_NAMES = [
    "contours_registry.json",
    "object_passports.json",
    "providers_registry.json",
    "contour_provider_policy.json",
    "provider_failover_policy.json",
    "managed_channel_schema.json",
    "telegram_input_envelope_schema.json",
    "telegram_to_managed_channel_mapping.json",
]
CANONICAL = {
    "contours_registry.json": "governance/registries/contours_registry.json",
    "object_passports.json": "governance/registries/object_passports.json",
    "providers_registry.json": "governance/registries/providers_registry.json",
    "contour_provider_policy.json": "governance/policies/contour_provider_policy.json",
    "provider_failover_policy.json": "governance/policies/provider_failover_policy.json",
    "managed_channel_schema.json": "governance/schemas/managed_channel_schema.json",
    "telegram_input_envelope_schema.json": "governance/schemas/telegram_input_envelope_schema.json",
    "telegram_to_managed_channel_mapping.json": "governance/mappings/telegram_to_managed_channel_mapping.json",
}

def main() -> int:
    found = {}
    for name in TARGET_NAMES:
        paths = sorted(str(p) for p in Path("governance").rglob(name) if "archive" not in p.parts and "codex" not in p.parts)
        found[name] = {"canonical": CANONICAL[name], "all_paths": paths, "non_canonical": [p for p in paths if p != CANONICAL[name]]}
    out = Path("governance/state/TZ2_DISCOVERED_SSOT_DUPLICATE_PATHS.json")
    out.write_text(json.dumps({"release_pass": False, "duplicates": found}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
    print(json.dumps({"status":"ok","output":str(out),"release_pass":False}, ensure_ascii=False))
    return 0

if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())
